posts.author: Charanjeev_Kohli
posts.text: so far 3.2 Cr REs have been traded on exchanges, the stock price & volumes indicate that promoter is struggling to offload the qty. While current valuation is tempting, risk is in case Right issue gets cancelled. posts.author: PP1
posts.text: Would you know how successful the promoters have been in privately placing their 15+ crore of rights entitlements? Are the promoters confident of selling all their entitlements to private parties?

posts.author: doniv
posts.text: thanks.. just saw the note in the letter of Offer confirming the same..

posts.author: Charanjeev_Kohli
posts.text: yes, decalared it’s clever move. They hold >75% equity, SEBI doesn’t allow promoters to participate in any fresh equity infusion till the time they bring down to 75%. Sumeet Ind promoters have brought Rights issue, shall renounce the entitlements, get 150 Cr back (out of ~225 Cr invested in Sumeet)

posts.author: doniv
posts.text: Hi.. how do you know that the promoters are not participating? Has it been declared?
